capabilities.title: Open-data base twin
capabilities.promise: Any city can start from public/open data.
capabilities.productGap: Open-data refresh is still script/admin driven and needs a city-operable workflow with progress and quality reporting.

capabilities.title: Consolidated city inventory
capabilities.promise: The city is one inventory enriched by source evidence, not separate OSM/Overture UI truth.
capabilities.productGap: Dedicated inventory and entity-evidence APIs/UI are still missing.

capabilities.title: Source catalog
capabilities.promise: Every source has license, distribution, quality, attribution, and spatial metadata.
capabilities.productGap: Need a source catalog UI and access-right/license cleanup.

capabilities.title: Provenance and evidence
capabilities.promise: Every consolidated entity can be traced back to source evidence and review decisions.
capabilities.productGap: Need entity evidence endpoint and analyst evidence panel.

capabilities.title: Standards publication
capabilities.promise: The twin exposes standards-native outputs, not just internal JSON.
capabilities.productGap: Need standards module with endpoint status, examples, explorer links, and versioning.

capabilities.title: FIWARE live context
capabilities.promise: FIWARE is the live context/interconnection layer over durable PostGIS inventory.
capabilities.productGap: Need real broker profile, resumable sync, auth, retries, and operator UI.

capabilities.title: Provider and private-data connectors
capabilities.promise: City, provider, flood, fire, satellite, IoT, BIM, and other datasets can attach through APIs.
capabilities.productGap: Need validation/publication gates and a product-grade provider onboarding flow.

capabilities.title: Large-city viewer aggregates
capabilities.promise: Large cities use cached summaries, density grids, viewport windows, and tiles instead of full-city browser payloads.
capabilities.productGap: Cockpit indicators still need to come only from LDT-native summaries/science reports.

capabilities.title: Urban science
capabilities.promise: City analytics are reproducible observations with methods, quality, uncertainty, and model contracts.
capabilities.productGap: Need UI module and better population, district, graph, and calibration datasets.

capabilities.title: Social, economic, and cultural layer
capabilities.promise: Social/cultural analysis is aggregate, privacy-safe, and source-quality explicit.
capabilities.productGap: Need UI module, population grids, district aggregation, and privacy-aware public/private modes.

capabilities.title: Semantic packs
capabilities.promise: Domain logic attaches as explicit service packs with rules, blocked claims, features, workflows, and exports.
capabilities.productGap: Need semantic-pack UI with review workflows and blocked operational claims.

capabilities.title: API observability
capabilities.promise: Operators can see API usage, latency, errors, route family, city, and role.
capabilities.productGap: Need middleware, metrics endpoint, Grafana dashboard, and API usage panel.

capabilities.title: One-city open-source install
capabilities.promise: A city can install one backend and lightweight UI for its own base twin.
capabilities.productGap: Need clean one-city setup, env template, create-city, backup/restore, smoke tests, and wiki.

town.title: Kharkiv
town.extract: Kharkiv, also known as Kharkov, is the second-largest city in Ukraine. Located in the northeast of the country, it is the largest city of the historic region of Sloboda Ukraine. Kharkiv is the administrative center of Kharkiv Oblast and Kharkiv Raion. Prior to the Russian invasion of Ukraine in early 2022, it had an estimated population of 1,421,125.

municipality.title: Kharkiv
municipality.extract: Kharkiv, also known as Kharkov, is the second-largest city in Ukraine. Located in the northeast of the country, it is the largest city of the historic region of Sloboda Ukraine. Kharkiv is the administrative center of Kharkiv Oblast and Kharkiv Raion. Prior to the Russian invasion of Ukraine in early 2022, it had an estimated population of 1,421,125.

warnings: 900 road entities are available. Large-city road coverage is still weak if it is tiny relative to the built fabric.
180 green-blue entities are available. Classification depth is still a Phase 11/13 task.
Workspace, map, municipal 3D, and public immersive surfaces are split into the intended product architecture, but Phase 13 visual hardening is still in progress.

readinessChecks.label: Single-city demo posture
readinessChecks.summary: Kharkiv is the active demo city for the current product path.

readinessChecks.label: Open source coverage
readinessChecks.summary: 9 datasets and 293076 source features are attached to this city.

readinessChecks.label: Road network coverage
readinessChecks.summary: 900 road entities are available. Large-city road coverage is still weak if it is tiny relative to the built fabric.
readinessChecks.action: Reingest roads with a heavy-city profile or add a stronger open road source.

readinessChecks.label: Service and place anchors
readinessChecks.summary: 240 facilities and 35 places are available as city analyst anchors.

readinessChecks.label: Green-blue coverage
readinessChecks.summary: 180 green-blue entities are available. Classification depth is still a Phase 11/13 task.
readinessChecks.action: Classify parks, water, forest, reserves, and public realm before environmental claims.

readinessChecks.label: Standards publication
readinessChecks.summary: 231996 NGSI-LD projections, 5 OGC collections, and 9 DCAT datasets are generated.

readinessChecks.label: Science, society, and semantic reports
readinessChecks.summary: 10 science observations, 10 society observations, and 10 semantic indicators exist.
readinessChecks.action: Phase 11 must expose these as analyst modules instead of hiding them in backend reports.

readinessChecks.label: Workflow readiness
readinessChecks.summary: 3 workflow definitions, 24 runs, and 0 pending approvals are recorded.
readinessChecks.action: Build the lightweight worker only after approval-gated APIs stay stable.

readinessChecks.label: API observability
readinessChecks.summary: 6088 API usage events are recorded for this city.
readinessChecks.action: Add request IDs, route-family metrics, Prometheus/Grafana export, and API usage UI in Phase 12.

readinessChecks.label: UI product surface
readinessChecks.summary: Workspace, map, municipal 3D, and public immersive surfaces are split into the intended product architecture, but Phase 13 visual hardening is still in progress.
readinessChecks.action: Finish Phase 13 visual smoke, query/share/embed UI polish, and signed/public embed policy before closing the visual rebuild.

readinessGaps.label: Road network coverage
readinessGaps.summary: 900 road entities are available. Large-city road coverage is still weak if it is tiny relative to the built fabric.
readinessGaps.action: Reingest roads with a heavy-city profile or add a stronger open road source.

readinessGaps.label: Green-blue coverage
readinessGaps.summary: 180 green-blue entities are available. Classification depth is still a Phase 11/13 task.
readinessGaps.action: Classify parks, water, forest, reserves, and public realm before environmental claims.

readinessGaps.label: UI product surface
readinessGaps.summary: Workspace, map, municipal 3D, and public immersive surfaces are split into the intended product architecture, but Phase 13 visual hardening is still in progress.
readinessGaps.action: Finish Phase 13 visual smoke, query/share/embed UI polish, and signed/public embed policy before closing the visual rebuild.
